name: SoundByte - Transformers OC
description:
Transformers OC

Soundwave's brother

Name: Soundbyte
Nicknames: Byte

Gender: Male

Appearance: Orange eyes, taller than Bee but slimmer, Jet (flight), mainly black with silver & green highlights, usually always wears mouth guard

Personality: Quiet, calm, observant, prideful, cold (to certain people), doesn't show many emotions (even less than Optimus), intelligent,

Exceptional mechanical engineer, knows anything and everything there is to know about Cybertronian anatomy and how the body works, with those two things he's an excellent and even an experienced medic but that's not his main job.

Former Decepticon, rarely talks, can have a whole face mask if wanted (like Soundwave) but usually only wears mouth guard, usually talks short sentences with radio audios, records voice clips/video clips of everyone (best/funny/proud/inspiring moments)


This is my first character on this platform so I hope it doesn't suck qwq and please have mercy on me, if there's any suggestions on other bots I should make or adjustments, I would love to hear them!! I have a lot of OC's already made and lots of ideas for more so your guys' motivation or suggestions would be a big help for me to make more
creator: Atlas6Shifter
